features: Feature: Configurable Scoop & Homebrew package manager options in the installation guide
Feature: Dynamic local client upgrade command recommendation (`lfr-tunnel -upgrade`) for returning users
Enhancement: Balanced two-column dashboard overview grid layout and spacing improvements
Feature: API rate-limiting bypass configuration flag (`disable_api_rate_limit`) for E2E automation environments
Enhancement: Dynamic recommended installer label adjustments based on Scoop/Brew configurations in the guide modal
Enhancement: Renamed overview button labels to 'Other Operating Systems' for improved clarity
Fix: Improved toaster text readability and fixed mobile touch backdrop closing gestures
Feature: Password manager autofill & autocomplete support for login/registration form fields
Feature: Slide-over navigation drawer overlay and backdrop closing mechanics on mobile screens
Enhancement: Stackable layout grids, page paddings, and absolute button repositions for phone/tablet responsiveness
Enhancement: Increased responsive breakpoint to 1024px to support landscape orientation on mobile/tablet devices
Fix: Added word-break text wrapping to the SHA256 checksum card element to prevent layout overflows
Feature: Enabled SQLite WAL (Write-Ahead Logging) mode and restricted write connections pool (#464)
Feature: Clean http.Server listener shutdown lifecycle inside gateway Stop() (#463)
Security: Thread-safe WebSocket connection wrapper safeConn to prevent concurrent write corruptions (#465)
Security: Constant-time secure passcode hashing (SHA256) and masked audit log outputs (#466)
Enhancement: Request-phase context cancellation propagation to throttled readers (#467)
Enhancement: Connection timeouts on SMTP mail client TLS dialing (#468)
Fix: Resolved mobile sidebar overlay visibility when toggling from collapsed state
